data.title: Meijer donates $500,000 for a new food marketing hub at Western Michigan University's Haworth College of Business.
data.description: In Kalamazoo, Michigan on September 25, 2025, Meijer revealed a generous contribution of $500,000 to Western Michigan University's Haworth College of Business Food Marketing Program. This substantial donation aims to boost the establishment of a cutting-edge food marketing hub. The initiative is designed to assist students involved in the program in enhancing their skills and knowledge in the field of food marketing.

data.title: Stellar's price forecast aims for $0.47 recovery amid bearish trend, with $0.34 crucial support for Q4 2025 prediction.
data.description: The price forecast for XLM indicates a potential resistance test at $0.47 in the next 4-6 weeks, even amidst the current bearish trend. The crucial support level at $0.34 will play a significant role in determining the trajectory for the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: British American Household Staffing opens new office in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, expanding presence in the Middle East.
data.description: Luxury domestic staffing agency British American Household Staffing (BAHS) has recently inaugurated an office in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on September 25, 2025. The agency is renowned for its expertise in providing household staffing, childcare services, and crew placement for yachts and aviation. This expansion marks BAHS's commitment to serving clients in the region and enhancing its global presence.

data.title: Petrus Resources Ltd. provides monthly activity update on website. Visit https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.
data.description: In Calgary, Alberta on September 25, 2025, Petrus Resources Ltd. (TSX: PRQ) shared that the latest monthly activity update is accessible on the company's website, https://www.petrusresources.com/monthlyupdates.

data.title: Doug Bowser to retire as President and COO of Nintendo of America on Dec 31, 2025, after a decade. Devon Pritchard to succeed him, with Satoru Shibata as CEO.
data.description: In Redmond, Washington, Nintendo of America Inc. revealed that President and Chief Operating Officer Doug Bowser will retire on December 31, 2025, following over a decade in various leadership roles. Stepping into his place will be Devon Pritchard, boasting 19 years of experience in the video game sector and a substantial history with the NOA leadership. Satoru Shibata will also come on board as the new Chief Executive Officer, taking on this role alongside his current positions as Managing Executive Officer.

data.title: Richmond American Homes introduces new Kipling townhome model in Mount Juliet,TN, opening soon at The Towns at Lynwood Station.
data.description: A new Kipling townhome is set to launch at The Towns at Lynwood Station in MOUNT JULIET, Tennessee on September 25, 2025. This development is brought by Richmond American Homes of Tennessee, Inc., a subsidiary of Sekisui House U.S., Inc. The brand-new Kipling model home will be available for viewing.

data.title: Bitcoin drops below $109K with $22B BTC options expiry looming. Traders anticipate a bounce after hitting a 3-week low.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin experienced a drop to a three-week low, falling below $109,000. However, there is optimism that the upcoming $22 billion options expiry at the end of the month could potentially trigger a significant increase in the BTC price.

data.title: TRON aims for $0.36 breakout despite bearish momentum, with predictions ranging from $0.319-$1.06. 9% upside expected in 2 weeks.
data.description: Analysts are giving mixed signals for the TRON forecast, with targets ranging from $0.319 to $1.06. Predictions for the TRX price indicate a potential 9% increase to reach the $0.36 resistance level in the next two weeks.

data.title: New Found Gold confirms high-grade core in Iceberg excavation channel sampling. (characters: 78)
data.description: Headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, on September 25, 2025, New Found Gold Corp. revealed the outcomes of a channel sampling initiative at the Iceberg excavation within the AFZ Core region. The company, traded under the ticker symbols TSXV: NFG and NYSE-A: NFGC, disclosed the findings of the program at the site.

data.title: Cadence Bank sponsors SIAC Conference, furthers vision of prosperity. Named official banking sponsor. (Characters: 94)
data.description: Cadence Bank (NYSE: CADE) has been appointed as the official banking sponsor of the conference in Atlanta on September 25, 2025. This sponsorship aligns with Cadence's mission to promote the prosperity of individuals, businesses, and communities. As part of this partnership, Cadence will support the Southern Intercollegiate Athletic Conference, showcasing its commitment to fostering growth and success.
Medicenna releases results from latest shareholder meeting; details in company announcement.

data.title: Realty Income prices $800 million dual-tranche offering of senior unsecured notes with 3.950% due 2029.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in San Diego, Realty Income Corporation (NYSE: O), known as The Monthly Dividend Company®, revealed the details of its latest financial move. The company successfully priced a public offering totaling $400 million for 3.950% senior unsecured notes set to mature on February 1, 2029, also referred to as the "2029 notes." Alongside this, another $400 million worth of undisclosed notes were also part of the offering.

data.title: Stock market falls for third consecutive day, Dow Jones lower. IBM surges on quantum bets. Oracle and Tesla see sell-offs.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index closed with a decrease, as Wall Street reacted to unexpected figures for GDP and unemployment claims. Both Oracle and Tesla experienced declines in their stock prices. This marks the third consecutive day of losses for the stock market indexes. On a positive note, IBM saw a significant increase in value due to its investments in quantum technology.

data.title: Chemtrade Logistics Income Fund (TSX: CHE.UN) to purchase up to 11,231,131 of its units with new automatic securities purchase plan.
data.description: Chemtrade Logistics Income Fund (TSX: CHE.UN) revealed its latest move on September 25, 2025. The Fund disclosed entering into an automatic securities purchase plan (ASPP) with its designated broker in relation to its ongoing normal course issuer bid (NCIB). The NCIB aims to buy back up to 11,231,131 of its units. This strategic financial decision reflects Chemtrade's commitment to enhancing shareholder value and optimizing its capital structure.

data.title: Lamb Weston Holdings announces $0.37/share quarterly dividend, payable on Nov 28, 2025, to stockholders as of Oct 31.
data.description: In Eagle, Idaho, the Board of Directors of Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: LW) announced a quarterly dividend of $0.37 per share for their common stock. This dividend will be paid on November 28, 2025, to shareholders of record as of October 31, 2025. Lamb Weston, a major frozen potato product supplier globally, has been in operation for 75 years and is known for its innovative contributions to the industry.
